identity.name: Wilson Souto
identity.description: Software Developer focused on generating value by solving problems and building solutions

introduction: Software Developer focused on generating value by solving problems and building solutions. Strong communication, continuous learning, and teamwork skills. Experience in sectors such as technology consulting, AI, and finance — driving business success.

responsabilities: Worked in the Collateral OTC team, managing collateralized asset replication, derivatives imports (swaps, options, NDFs), and margin and box calculations.
Migrated legacy systems to a modern stack with .NET 8, refactored into microservices, and deployed on cloud infrastructure to increase scalability and resilience.
Developed and maintained workflows for stocks, funds, government and corporate bonds, supporting accurate collateral management across custodians.
Collaborated with operations to troubleshoot issues, prioritize demands by business impact, and enhance collateral processes.
Developed AI-powered chatbots with ASP.NET Core and the OpenAI API, automating user interactions and integrating workflows.
Built and maintained internal and external RESTful APIs, enabling secure and reliable system integration.
Optimized RabbitMQ message handling, reducing dead-letter queue bottlenecks by 60%, improving responsiveness and efficiency.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and Docker, streamlining deployments and boosting scalability.
Contributed to applications using IBM Watson Assistant, IBM Cloud, and IBM Storage.
Built software components in C#, applying object-oriented principles for clarity and scalability.
Implemented CRUD operations and improved data management with SQL Server and Entity Framework Core in ASP.NET Core.
Collaborated in Agile sprints, gaining hands-on experience in planning, execution, and code reviews.

education.degree: Associate's Degree in Systems Analysis and Development
